Promote a spirit of competition for all members.
Assist students in the establishment of occupational goals.

The test will not have any specific sections or weighting for topics.
Competitors can choose which questions to answer.
questions.correctAnswer: The test will not have any specific sections or weighting for topics.
questions.Help: Understand the implication of 'no test composition' in event guidelines.

questions.question: What is the national membership dues deadline for FBLA to be eligible for NLC competitive events?
options: December 1 of the current school year
February 15 of the current school year
March 1 of the current school year
April 15 of the current school year
questions.correctAnswer: March 1 of the current school year
questions.Help: Recall the crucial deadline for NLC eligibility.

questions.question: If a member placed in the top 10 of an event at a previous NLC, what is their eligibility status for competing in the same event at future NLCs?
options: They are always eligible if they win at the state level again.
They are no longer eligible, unless the event was substantially modified.
They can only compete if they change divisions (e.g., from High School to PBL).
They can compete if they form a new team for the event.
questions.correctAnswer: They are no longer eligible, unless the event was substantially modified.
questions.Help: Understand the 'repeat competitor' rule for NLC.

questions.question: What is a mandatory requirement for competitors regarding accommodation at the NLC?
options: They must secure their own accommodation independently.
They must stay within the official FBLA housing block.
They must stay at a hotel recommended by their state leader.
They are allowed to commute daily from home, regardless of distance.
questions.correctAnswer: They must stay within the official FBLA housing block.
questions.Help: Recall the strict accommodation requirement for NLC eligibility.

questions.question: To be eligible for an award at the National Leadership Conference, each competitor must:
options: Attend all social events at the NLC.
Volunteer for at least one hour at the NLC.
Complete all components of the event.
questions.correctAnswer: Complete all components of the event.
questions.Help: Understand the fundamental participation requirement for awards.

questions.question: What is the maximum number of individual or team events a member may participate in at the NLC?
questions.Help: Remember the participation limit for individual or team events.

questions.question: What is the maximum number of chapter events a member may participate in at the NLC?
questions.Help: Remember the participation limit for chapter events.

options: A credit card with a photo
A printout of a digital ID without verification
questions.Help: Identify valid forms of photo ID for NLC.

questions.question: If a competitor arrives late to a competitive event, how many penalty points will be assessed?
options: No penalty if still within the event time.
questions.Help: Recall the specific penalty for late arrivals.

questions.question: What is generally NOT permitted regarding schedule changes at the NLC?
options: Swapping event slots with another competitor
questions.Help: Remember the rule about NLC schedule flexibility.

questions.Help: Identify the exemption for chapter events regarding repeat participants.

questions.Help: Identify the specific device requirement for competitors.

questions.question: Which item does FBLA typically provide on-site for the 'Introduction to FBLA' objective test?
questions.Help: Recall what resources FBLA supplies at the testing site.

questions.question: Are reference or study materials permitted at the testing site for the 'Introduction to FBLA' event?
options: Yes, if they are printed and bound.
No, reference or study materials are not permitted.
Only notes written during previous FBLA events.
questions.correctAnswer: No, reference or study materials are not permitted.
questions.Help: Remember the rule regarding study materials at the test.

questions.question: What type of calculator is allowed for the 'Introduction to FBLA' objective test?
options: An online calculator provided within the testing platform
No calculators of any kind are permitted.
questions.correctAnswer: An online calculator provided within the testing platform
questions.Help: Identify the specific calculator policy for the test.

questions.question: Competitors may flag questions within the testing platform for review:
options: Only at the beginning of the test.
Prior to the finalization of results at the NLC.
After the test is submitted, via email.
Only if there is a technical error.
questions.correctAnswer: Prior to the finalization of results at the NLC.
questions.Help: Understand when the question review feature can be used.

questions.question: The 'Introduction to FBLA' test is completed:
options: On-site at the National Leadership Conference.
At the local chapter adviser's office.
During a scheduled school day within the classroom.
questions.correctAnswer: On-site at the National Leadership Conference.
questions.Help: Recall the location and method of testing.

questions.question: What is provided to competitors at test check-in for online testing?
options: A pre-assigned seat number and desk.
A physical copy of the test questions.
A flash drive containing the test software.
questions.Help: Identify the specific credential provided for online test access.

questions.question: Competitors are required to provide a sharpened pencil for the online test. What is its primary purpose, given the online format?
options: To mark answers on a separate bubble sheet.
For taking notes on scratch paper.
questions.correctAnswer: For taking notes on scratch paper.
questions.Help: Infer the utility of a pencil in an online testing environment.

questions.question: All schedules for the NLC are posted in what time zone?
options: Local time for the NLC host city
questions.correctAnswer: Local time for the NLC host city
questions.Help: Remember the standard for NLC schedule timings.

questions.question: What specifically does FBLA provide on-site regarding scratch paper?
options: One piece of scratch paper per competitor.
Scratch paper is not allowed for online tests.
Competitors must bring their own scratch paper.
questions.correctAnswer: One piece of scratch paper per competitor.
questions.Help: Recall the exact provision for scratch paper.

questions.question: In the 'Introduction to FBLA' objective test, how many points is each correct answer worth?
questions.Help: Remember the scoring value for each correct answer.

questions.question: Are points deducted for incorrect answers in the 'Introduction to FBLA' objective test?
options: Yes, a quarter point per incorrect answer.
Yes, half a point per incorrect answer.
No, points are not deducted for incorrect answers.
questions.correctAnswer: No, points are not deducted for incorrect answers.
questions.Help: Recall the policy on penalty for wrong answers.

questions.question: What is the first tiebreaker criterion used for the 'Introduction to FBLA' objective test?
options: The competitor who completed the test fastest.
The number of correct responses to 10 pre-selected tiebreaker questions.
The number of correct responses to 20 pre-selected questions.
questions.correctAnswer: The number of correct responses to 10 pre-selected tiebreaker questions.
questions.Help: Identify the primary tiebreaker rule.

questions.question: If a tie remains after the first tiebreaker, what is the second tiebreaker criterion?
options: The number of correct responses to 20 pre-selected questions.
questions.correctAnswer: The number of correct responses to 20 pre-selected questions.
questions.Help: Recall the secondary tiebreaker rule.

questions.question: What is the final tiebreaker criterion if a tie still remains after the first two criteria?
options: The competitor with the highest score on general knowledge questions.
The competitor who completed the test in the shortest amount of time.
The competitor with the most FBLA service hours.
The competitor with the highest number of correct answers on the entire test (re-evaluated).
questions.correctAnswer: The competitor who completed the test in the shortest amount of time.
questions.Help: Identify the ultimate tiebreaker rule.

questions.question: Results announced at the National Leadership Conference are considered official and will not be changed after:
options: The end of the awards ceremony.
The conclusion of the National Leadership Conference.
The finalization of all national officer elections.
questions.correctAnswer: The conclusion of the National Leadership Conference.
questions.Help: Understand the finality of NLC results.

questions.question: What is the maximum number of entries (individuals or teams) that may be recognized per event at the National Leadership Conference?
questions.Help: Remember the limit for recognized places in competitive events.

questions.question: If a competitor does not complete all components of an event at the NLC, they are ineligible for an award, regardless of their score. This highlights the importance of:
options: Active participation in all parts of the event
questions.correctAnswer: Active participation in all parts of the event
questions.Help: Understand the 'participation requirement' for award eligibility.

questions.question: Under what circumstances might competitors be disqualified from a competitive event?

If they arrive more than 10 minutes late.
If they violate the Code of Conduct or the Honor Code.
